overview.value: Peace Lily is a leafy indoor plant with white spathes that appear above dark green foliage. It prefers evenly moist soil and stable indoor conditions.

careDifficultyDescription.value: Easy to read because it droops when thirsty, but dislikes dry soil for too long.

light.value: Medium to bright indirect light; too little light reduces blooms.

water.value: Water when the top 2 cm of soil dries or leaves begin to soften.

humidityDescription.value: Appreciates moderate humidity and clean leaves.

diseaseRiskDescription.value: Brown tips can come from dry air, salts, or inconsistent watering.

fertilizer.value: Feed monthly in spring and summer at half strength.

tips.value: Wipe leaves regularly so the plant can photosynthesize efficiently.
